comment: This is generated by ESQL's FieldExtractTests. Do not edit it. See docs/reference/query-languages/esql/README.md for how to regenerate it.
name: field_extract
description:
Extracts the value of a single sub-field from a
`flattened` field
root as `keyword`.
examples:
FROM flattened_otel_logs
| WHERE @timestamp == "2020-01-01T00:02:48.461Z"
| EVAL hn = field_extract(resource.attributes, "host.name")
| KEEP hn
